query:
SELECT 
  c.id as contrato_id,
  c.leadId,
  c.valorVenda,
  c.corretorId,
  u.email,
  u.role
FROM contratos c
JOIN users u ON c.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%Nunes%' AND u.role = 'admin';
